generated_oml:
import DTDFVocab from "https://example.com/DTDFVocab"

instance HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLiDARPointClouds
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDepthImageData
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle speed for ACC system"

]

    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring motor current for power control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance SteeringServoPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering servo position for control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoPositionData
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance HokuyoLiDARPointClouds : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
]

instance IntelDepthImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
    base:desc "Depth image data from Intel D435i camera transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
    base:desc "Steering angle data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Motor current data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
]

instance SteeringServoPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoPositionSensor
    base:desc "Steering servo position data transmitted via Wi-Fi UDP"
]

instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARPointClouds
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks after point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARPointClouds
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Iso23247DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance TranslatedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 translated object tracks with unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARPointClouds
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance MotorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current and steering servo position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData, SteeringServoPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm with Kalman filter for object trajectory prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control component for vehicle speed regulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for point cloud clustering and tracking using DBSCAN and Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

    base:desc "ISO 23247 data translation for serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for Adaptive Cruise Control speed regulation"

]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data monitoring and visualization"

]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language for data processing scripts"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance CppCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for high-performance components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and development"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path with save and report generation capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackInsight, DrivingPathInsight, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads lead vehicle detection, desired speed computation, and actuation control to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, DesiredSpeedComputationInsight, ActuationControlAction
]

    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteEnableAction, RemoteDisableAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

]

]

]

]

    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system remotely"

    base:desc "Send emergency braking command remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Edge computing device for real-time data processing"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller for motor actuation"
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization system for real-time ACC data"
    base:isContainedIn UserEntity
]

instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface for remote ACC management"
    base:isContainedIn UserEntity
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User-facing environment for monitoring and remote management"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationComponent, ControlPanelComponent
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Central processing environment for Digital Twin operations"
    base:contains NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, MATLABSimulink
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical system environment handling sensor data and actuation"
    base:contains HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorCurrentSensor, SteeringServoPositionSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured SQL database for vehicle state and object track storage"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData, MotorCurrentData, SteeringServoPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands from the ACC Controlling FE are serialized and translated by the Data Translation component before transmission over Wi-Fi using UDP to physical actuators (Motor and Steering Servo). The document does not specify command validation, authentication, or feedback mechanisms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms is required for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading, as constrained by hardware limitations; this is less stringent than safety-critical vehicular standards which mandate synchronization better than 100 ms."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 RA-based architecture mapping software components to Functional Entities implemented as ROS2 packages containing ROS2 nodes. Entities include User Entity (3D Visualization, Control Panel), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control), and Physical Twin Entity (resource-specific functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), which replaces the standard OME, impacting functionality ownership and engineering processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Intra-digital twin software component communication uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication between physical and digital entities occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer protocol. Bandwidth, latency, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements (Part 3), and Information exchange (Part 4). The reference architecture defines entities such as Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Information exchange standards specify interoperability protocols, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) cited as a relevant technology for data collection and device control implementation."
]
